---
title: "itm_pseudobulk_edgeR_GSEA"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-13"
---

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(Matrix)
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(ggplot2)

# Optional but useful for pathway enrichment
library(msigdbr)
library(fgsea)

meta <- itm_obj@meta.data

celltype_col <- "cath_grouped_Minor_exp"
group_col    <- "cath_timepoint_response"
sample_col   <- "SAMPLE_ID"

celltypes_to_test <- c(
  "Melanocyte",
  "CD8_T",
  "Endothelial",
  "Macrophage"
)

group_order <- c(
  "PRE_Responsive",
  "PRE_Resistant",
  "PROG_Resistant"
)

output_dir <- "ITM_rebuttal/scRNAseq_pseudobulk_DE"
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
stopifnot(all(c(celltype_col, group_col, sample_col) %in% colnames(meta)))

table(meta[[group_col]])
table(meta[[celltype_col]])
```

```{r}
pb_sep <- "||"

itm_obj$pb_celltype <- itm_obj@meta.data[[celltype_col]]
itm_obj$pb_group    <- itm_obj@meta.data[[group_col]]
itm_obj$pb_sample   <- itm_obj@meta.data[[sample_col]]

itm_obj$pb_id <- paste(
  itm_obj$pb_sample,
  itm_obj$pb_celltype,
  sep = pb_sep
)

head(itm_obj$pb_id)
```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(itm_obj) <- "RNA"

pb_counts_list <- AggregateExpression(
  object = itm_obj,
  assays = "RNA",
  group.by = "pb_id",
  slot = "counts",
  return.seurat = FALSE
)

pb_counts <- pb_counts_list$RNA

dim(pb_counts)
pb_counts[1:5, 1:5]
```

```{r}
pb_meta <- data.frame(
  pb_id = colnames(pb_counts)
) %>%
  separate(
    pb_id,
    into = c("SAMPLE_ID", "celltype"),
    sep = "\\|\\|",
    remove = FALSE
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    meta %>%
      distinct(
        !!sym(sample_col),
        !!sym(group_col)
      ) %>%
      rename(
        group = !!sym(group_col)
      ),
    by = "SAMPLE_ID"
  )

pb_meta$group <- factor(pb_meta$group, levels = group_order)
pb_meta$celltype <- factor(pb_meta$celltype)

rownames(pb_meta) <- pb_meta$pb_id
pb_meta <- pb_meta[colnames(pb_counts), ]

head(pb_meta)
table(pb_meta$celltype, pb_meta$group)
```


```{r}
# Build pseudobulk metadata directly from original cell metadata
pb_meta_from_cells <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    pb_id_original = paste(
      .data[[sample_col]],
      .data[[celltype_col]],
      sep = pb_sep
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(pb_id_original) %>%
  summarise(
    SAMPLE_ID = first(.data[[sample_col]]),
    celltype_original = first(.data[[celltype_col]]),
    group = first(.data[[group_col]]),
    n_cells = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(pb_meta_from_cells)
```

```{r}
# Match Seurat's sanitised pseudobulk column names
pb_meta_from_cells <- pb_meta_from_cells %>%
  mutate(
    pb_id = gsub("_", "-", pb_id_original)
  )

head(pb_meta_from_cells[, c("pb_id_original", "pb_id")])
head(colnames(pb_counts))
```

```{r}
pb_meta <- pb_meta %>%
  mutate(
    celltype = celltype_original,
    group = factor(group, levels = group_order),
    celltype = factor(celltype)
  )

# reset rownames after dplyr operations
pb_meta <- as.data.frame(pb_meta)
rownames(pb_meta) <- pb_meta$pb_id

# reorder again just to be safe
pb_meta <- pb_meta[colnames(pb_counts), , drop = FALSE]

# final check
ncol(pb_counts)
nrow(pb_meta)
all(colnames(pb_counts) == rownames(pb_meta))
sum(is.na(pb_meta$group))
table(pb_meta$celltype, pb_meta$group)
```


```{r}
pb_ncells <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    pb_id_original = paste(
      .data[[sample_col]],
      .data[[celltype_col]],
      sep = pb_sep
    ),
    pb_id = gsub("_", "-", pb_id_original)
  ) %>%
  count(pb_id, name = "n_cells_check")
```

```{r}
colnames(pb_meta)
head(pb_meta[, c("pb_id", "celltype", "group", "n_cells")])
```

```{r}
summary(pb_meta$n_cells)

pb_meta %>%
  filter(celltype %in% celltypes_to_test) %>%
  group_by(celltype, group) %>%
  summarise(
    n_pb_all = n(),
    n_pb_ge5 = sum(n_cells >= 5),
    n_pb_ge10 = sum(n_cells >= 10),
    median_cells = median(n_cells),
    min_cells = min(n_cells),
    max_cells = max(n_cells),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
run_pseudobulk_edger <- function(
    counts,
    meta,
    celltype_use,
    group_col = "group",
    celltype_col = "celltype",
    min_cells_per_pb = 5,
    min_samples_per_group = 2,
    output_dir = NULL
) {
  
  message("Running pseudobulk DE for: ", celltype_use)
  
  # Subset to one cell type and remove very low-cell pseudobulk samples
  keep_pb <- meta[[celltype_col]] == celltype_use & meta$n_cells >= min_cells_per_pb
  
  meta_ct <- meta[keep_pb, , drop = FALSE]
  counts_ct <- counts[, rownames(meta_ct), drop = FALSE]
  
  # Drop unused group levels
  meta_ct[[group_col]] <- droplevels(meta_ct[[group_col]])
  
  # Check sample support
  group_counts <- table(meta_ct[[group_col]])
  print(group_counts)
  
  if (length(group_counts) < 2) {
    stop("Fewer than 2 groups available after filtering for ", celltype_use)
  }
  
  if (any(group_counts < min_samples_per_group)) {
    warning(
      "One or more groups have fewer than ",
      min_samples_per_group,
      " pseudobulk samples for ",
      celltype_use,
      ". Interpret carefully."
    )
  }
  
  # Create DGEList
  y <- edgeR::DGEList(counts = counts_ct)
  
  # Design matrix
  design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + meta_ct[[group_col]])
  colnames(design) <- levels(meta_ct[[group_col]])
  
  # Filter lowly expressed genes
  keep_genes <- edgeR::filterByExpr(y, design = design)
  y <- y[keep_genes, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
  
  # Normalisation
  y <- edgeR::calcNormFactors(y, method = "TMM")
  
  # Estimate dispersion and fit quasi-likelihood model
  y <- edgeR::estimateDisp(y, design)
  fit <- edgeR::glmQLFit(y, design)
  
  # Only create contrasts if both groups exist
  available_groups <- colnames(design)
  
  contrast_defs <- list()
  
  if (all(c("PRE_Resistant", "PRE_Responsive") %in% available_groups)) {
    contrast_defs[["PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive"]] <-
      limma::makeContrasts(PRE_Resistant - PRE_Responsive, levels = design)
  }
  
  if (all(c("PROG_Resistant", "PRE_Responsive") %in% available_groups)) {
    contrast_defs[["PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive"]] <-
      limma::makeContrasts(PROG_Resistant - PRE_Responsive, levels = design)
  }
  
  if (all(c("PROG_Resistant", "PRE_Resistant") %in% available_groups)) {
    contrast_defs[["PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Resistant"]] <-
      limma::makeContrasts(PROG_Resistant - PRE_Resistant, levels = design)
  }
  
  if (length(contrast_defs) == 0) {
    stop("No valid contrasts available for ", celltype_use)
  }
  
  # Run DE tests
  de_results <- list()
  
  for (contrast_name in names(contrast_defs)) {
    
    qlf <- edgeR::glmQLFTest(fit, contrast = contrast_defs[[contrast_name]])
    
    res <- edgeR::topTags(qlf, n = Inf)$table %>%
      tibble::rownames_to_column("gene") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        celltype = celltype_use,
        contrast = contrast_name
      )
    
    de_results[[contrast_name]] <- res
    
    if (!is.null(output_dir)) {
      write.csv(
        res,
        file.path(
          output_dir,
          paste0(
            "DE_edgeR_",
            celltype_use,
            "_",
            contrast_name,
            ".csv"
          )
        ),
        row.names = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
  
  return(list(
    celltype = celltype_use,
    meta = meta_ct,
    counts = counts_ct,
    y = y,
    design = design,
    fit = fit,
    de = de_results
  ))
}
```


```{r}
de_results_all <- list()

for (ct in celltypes_to_test) {
  de_results_all[[ct]] <- run_pseudobulk_edger(
    counts = pb_counts,
    meta = pb_meta,
    celltype_use = ct,
    group_col = "group",
    celltype_col = "celltype",
    min_cells_per_pb = 5,
    min_samples_per_group = 2,
    output_dir = output_dir
  )
}
```

```{r}
lapply(de_results_all, function(x) table(x$meta$group))
```

```{r}
de_all_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  lapply(de_results_all, function(x) {
    dplyr::bind_rows(x$de)
  })
)

de_summary <- de_all_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sig_FDR_0.05 = FDR < 0.05,
    sig_FDR_0.10 = FDR < 0.10,
    up = logFC > 0,
    down = logFC < 0
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(celltype, contrast) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_genes_tested = dplyr::n(),
    n_FDR_0.05 = sum(sig_FDR_0.05),
    n_FDR_0.10 = sum(sig_FDR_0.10),
    n_up_FDR_0.05 = sum(sig_FDR_0.05 & up),
    n_down_FDR_0.05 = sum(sig_FDR_0.05 & down),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

de_summary
```

```{r}
write.csv(
  de_all_df,
  file.path(output_dir, "DE_edgeR_all_celltypes_all_contrasts.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  de_summary,
  file.path(output_dir, "DE_edgeR_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
library(msigdbr)
library(fgsea)
library(dplyr)

hallmark_sets <- msigdbr(
  species = "Homo sapiens",
  category = "H"
) %>%
  split(x = .$gene_symbol, f = .$gs_name)

run_fgsea_from_de <- function(
    de_df,
    pathways,
    minSize = 10,
    maxSize = 500
) {
  
  ranks <- de_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(PValue), !is.na(logFC)) %>%
    mutate(rank_metric = sign(logFC) * -log10(PValue)) %>%
    arrange(desc(rank_metric)) %>%
    distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)
  
  stats <- ranks$rank_metric
  names(stats) <- ranks$gene
  
  stats <- stats[is.finite(stats)]
  stats <- sort(stats, decreasing = TRUE)
  
  fg <- fgsea(
    pathways = pathways,
    stats = stats,
    minSize = minSize,
    maxSize = maxSize
  )
  
  fg <- as.data.frame(fg) %>%
    arrange(padj)
  
  fg$leadingEdge <- sapply(fg$leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";")
  
  fg
}
```

```{r}
gsea_hallmark_all <- list()

for (ct in names(de_results_all)) {
  for (contrast_name in names(de_results_all[[ct]]$de)) {
    
    message("Running Hallmark GSEA: ", ct, " - ", contrast_name)
    
    de_df <- de_results_all[[ct]]$de[[contrast_name]]
    
    fg <- run_fgsea_from_de(
      de_df = de_df,
      pathways = hallmark_sets,
      minSize = 10,
      maxSize = 500
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        celltype = ct,
        contrast = contrast_name,
        collection = "Hallmark"
      )
    
    gsea_hallmark_all[[paste(ct, contrast_name, sep = "__")]] <- fg
  }
}

gsea_hallmark_df <- bind_rows(gsea_hallmark_all)

write.csv(
  gsea_hallmark_df,
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_Hallmark_all_celltypes_all_contrasts.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
pathways_of_interest <- c(
  "HALLMARK_HYPOXIA",
  "HALLMARK_ANGIOGENESIS",
  "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION",
  "HALLMARK_TGF_BETA_SIGNALING",
  "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB",
  "HALLMARK_GLYCOLYSIS",
  "HALLMARK_FATTY_ACID_METABOLISM",
  "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION",
  "HALLMARK_COMPLEMENT",
  "HALLMARK_IL6_JAK_STAT3_SIGNALING",
  "HALLMARK_IL2_STAT5_SIGNALING"
)

gsea_story <- gsea_hallmark_df %>%
  filter(pathway %in% pathways_of_interest) %>%
  arrange(celltype, contrast, padj)

write.csv(
  gsea_story,
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_Hallmark_story_pathways.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

gsea_story
```

```{r}
genes_of_interest <- c(
  "BNIP3", "ADM", "SLC16A3", "HIF3A", "VEGFA", "VEGFC",
  "DDIT4", "HILPDA", "ARNT",
  "IFNG", "GZMB", "GZMA", "GZMK", "PRF1", "NKG7",
  "CRTAM", "SIRPG",
  "PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "FLT4", "PROX1", "PDPN",
  "SELE", "ICAM1", "THBS1", "LGALS9", "PLAU", "PLAUR"
)

key_gene_results <- de_all_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% genes_of_interest) %>%
  arrange(celltype, contrast, FDR)

write.csv(
  key_gene_results,
  file.path(output_dir, "DE_edgeR_key_genes_of_interest.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

key_gene_results
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
gsea_plot_df <- gsea_story %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_clean = pathway %>%
      str_replace("^HALLMARK_", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_to_title(),
    
    contrast_clean = case_when(
      contrast == "PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Resistant" ~ "PROG R vs PRE R",
      TRUE ~ contrast
    ),
    
    sig_label = case_when(
      padj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      padj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      padj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      padj < 0.10  ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    
    neglog10_padj = -log10(padj)
  )
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2) 
p_gsea_heatmap <- ggplot(
  gsea_plot_df,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = pathway_clean,
    fill = NES
  )
) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_label), size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~ celltype, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Pseudobulk GSEA of selected Hallmark pathways"
  )

p_gsea_heatmap
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_story_pathways_NES_heatmap.png"),
  plot = p_gsea_heatmap,
  width = 6,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
p_gsea_dot <- ggplot(
  gsea_plot_df,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = pathway_clean,
    colour = NES,
    size = neglog10_padj
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ celltype, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_colour_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "grey90",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(1, 5),
    name = "-log10(FDR)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Pseudobulk GSEA of selected Hallmark pathways"
  )

p_gsea_dot
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_story_pathways_dotplot.png"),
  plot = p_gsea_dot,
  width = 6,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
main_story_pathways <- c(
  "HALLMARK_HYPOXIA",
  "HALLMARK_ANGIOGENESIS",
  "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION",
  "HALLMARK_TGF_BETA_SIGNALING",
  "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB",
  "HALLMARK_GLYCOLYSIS",
  "HALLMARK_FATTY_ACID_METABOLISM",
  "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION"
)

gsea_main_df <- gsea_plot_df %>%
  filter(pathway %in% main_story_pathways)

p_gsea_main <- ggplot(
  gsea_main_df,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = pathway_clean,
    fill = NES
  )
) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_label), size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~ celltype, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Key pseudobulk GSEA pathways"
  )

p_gsea_main
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_main_story_pathways_heatmap.png"),
  plot = p_gsea_main,
  width = 5,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
key_gene_plot_df <- key_gene_results %>%
  mutate(
    contrast_clean = case_when(
      contrast == "PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Resistant" ~ "PROG R vs PRE R",
      TRUE ~ contrast
    ),
    
    sig_label = case_when(
      FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
      FDR < 0.01  ~ "**",
      FDR < 0.05  ~ "*",
      FDR < 0.10  ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    
    neglog10_fdr = -log10(FDR),
    
    gene_group = case_when(
      gene %in% c("BNIP3", "ADM", "SLC16A3", "HIF3A", "VEGFA", "VEGFC", "DDIT4", "HILPDA", "ARNT") ~ "Hypoxia / angiogenesis",
      gene %in% c("IFNG", "GZMB", "GZMA", "GZMK", "PRF1", "NKG7", "CRTAM", "SIRPG") ~ "CD8 activation / cytotoxicity",
      gene %in% c("PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "FLT4", "PROX1", "PDPN", "SELE", "ICAM1") ~ "Endothelial / lymphatic",
      gene %in% c("THBS1", "LGALS9", "PLAU", "PLAUR") ~ "ECM / tolerogenic",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
p_key_gene_heatmap <- ggplot(
  key_gene_plot_df,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = gene,
    fill = logFC
  )
) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_label), size = 3.5) +
  facet_grid(
    gene_group ~ celltype,
    scales = "free",
    space = "free"
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "logFC"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Key genes from pseudobulk DE"
  )

p_key_gene_heatmap
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "DE_key_genes_logFC_heatmap.png"),
  plot = p_key_gene_heatmap,
  width = 4.5,
  height = 7.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
p_key_gene_dot <- ggplot(
  key_gene_plot_df,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = gene,
    colour = logFC,
    size = neglog10_fdr
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_grid(
    gene_group ~ celltype,
    scales = "free",
    space = "free"
  ) +
  scale_colour_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "grey90",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "logFC"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(1, 5),
    name = "-log10(FDR)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Key genes from pseudobulk DE"
  )

p_key_gene_dot
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "DE_key_genes_logFC_dotplot.png"),
  plot = p_key_gene_dot,
  width = 4.5,
  height = 7.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
mel_hypoxia_genes <- c(
  "BNIP3", "ADM", "SLC16A3", "HIF3A",
  "VEGFA", "VEGFC", "DDIT4", "HILPDA", "ARNT"
)

mel_df <- key_gene_plot_df %>%
  filter(
    celltype == "Melanocyte",
    gene %in% mel_hypoxia_genes
  )

p_mel_hypoxia <- ggplot(
  mel_df,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = factor(gene, levels = rev(mel_hypoxia_genes)),
    fill = logFC
  )
) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_label), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "logFC"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Melanoma hypoxia and angiogenesis genes"
  )

p_mel_hypoxia
```

```{r}
cd8_genes <- c(
  "IFNG", "GZMB", "GZMA", "GZMK",
  "PRF1", "NKG7", "CRTAM", "SIRPG"
)

cd8_df <- key_gene_plot_df %>%
  filter(
    celltype == "CD8_T",
    gene %in% cd8_genes
  )

p_cd8_genes <- ggplot(
  cd8_df,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = factor(gene, levels = rev(cd8_genes)),
    fill = logFC
  )
) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_label), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "logFC"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "CD8 T-cell cytotoxic and IFN-associated genes"
  )

p_cd8_genes
```

```{r}
library(forcats)
top_gsea <- gsea_hallmark_df %>%
  group_by(celltype, contrast) %>%
  arrange(padj, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_clean = pathway %>%
      str_replace("^HALLMARK_", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_to_title(),
    contrast_clean = case_when(
      contrast == "PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Resistant" ~ "PROG R vs PRE R",
      TRUE ~ contrast
    ),
    neglog10_padj = -log10(padj)
  )

p_top_gsea <- ggplot(
  top_gsea,
  aes(
    x = NES,
    y = fct_reorder(pathway_clean, NES),
    colour = NES,
    size = neglog10_padj
  )
) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_grid(celltype ~ contrast_clean, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_colour_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "grey90",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(
    range = c(1, 5),
    name = "-log10(FDR)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "NES",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Top Hallmark pathways per cell type and contrast"
  )

p_top_gsea
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_top10_pathways_per_celltype_contrast.png"),
  plot = p_top_gsea,
  width = 8,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

story_pathways <- c(
  "HALLMARK_HYPOXIA",
  "HALLMARK_ANGIOGENESIS",
  "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION",
  "HALLMARK_TGF_BETA_SIGNALING",
  "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE",
  "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB",
  "HALLMARK_GLYCOLYSIS",
  "HALLMARK_FATTY_ACID_METABOLISM",
  "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION"
)

gsea_story_clean <- gsea_hallmark_df %>%
  filter(pathway %in% story_pathways) %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_clean = pathway %>%
      str_replace("^HALLMARK_", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_to_title(),
    
    pathway_clean = factor(
      pathway_clean,
      levels = rev(c(
        "Hypoxia",
        "Angiogenesis",
        "Epithelial Mesenchymal Transition",
        "Tgf Beta Signaling",
        "Interferon Gamma Response",
        "Interferon Alpha Response",
        "Inflammatory Response",
        "Tnfa Signaling Via Nfkb",
        "Glycolysis",
        "Fatty Acid Metabolism",
        "Oxidative Phosphorylation"
      ))
    ),
    
    contrast_clean = case_when(
      contrast == "PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Resistant" ~ "PROG R vs PRE R",
      TRUE ~ contrast
    ),
    
    contrast_clean = factor(
      contrast_clean,
      levels = c(
        "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
        "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
        "PROG R vs PRE R"
      )
    ),
    
    sig_label = case_when(
      padj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      padj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      padj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      padj < 0.10  ~ ".",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  )

p_gsea_story_heatmap <- ggplot(
  gsea_story_clean,
  aes(
    x = contrast_clean,
    y = pathway_clean,
    fill = NES
  )
) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sig_label), size = 3.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ celltype, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2C7BB6",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#D7191C",
    midpoint = 0,
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.4)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Pseudobulk GSEA of selected Hallmark pathways"
  )

p_gsea_story_heatmap
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_story_pathways_clean_heatmap.png"),
  plot = p_gsea_story_heatmap,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
plot_top_gsea_for_celltype <- function(
    gsea_df,
    celltype_use,
    top_n = 8,
    out_dir = output_dir
) {
  
  df <- gsea_df %>%
    filter(celltype == celltype_use) %>%
    group_by(contrast) %>%
    arrange(padj, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      pathway_clean = pathway %>%
        str_replace("^HALLMARK_", "") %>%
        str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
        str_to_title(),
      
      contrast_clean = case_when(
        contrast == "PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
        contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
        contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Resistant" ~ "PROG R vs PRE R",
        TRUE ~ contrast
      ),
      
      contrast_clean = factor(
        contrast_clean,
        levels = c(
          "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
          "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
          "PROG R vs PRE R"
        )
      ),
      
      neglog10_padj = -log10(padj),
      pathway_clean = reorder(pathway_clean, NES)
    )
  
  p <- ggplot(
    df,
    aes(
      x = NES,
      y = pathway_clean,
      colour = NES,
      size = neglog10_padj
    )
  ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    facet_wrap(~ contrast_clean, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_colour_gradient2(
      low = "#2C7BB6",
      mid = "grey90",
      high = "#D7191C",
      midpoint = 0,
      name = "NES"
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      range = c(1.5, 5),
      name = "-log10(FDR)"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.35)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "NES",
      y = NULL,
      title = paste0("Top Hallmark pathways: ", celltype_use)
    )
  
  print(p)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(out_dir, paste0("GSEA_top_pathways_", celltype_use, ".png")),
    plot = p,
    width = 11,
    height = 4.5,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}
```

```{r}
p_top_melanocyte <- plot_top_gsea_for_celltype(
  gsea_hallmark_df,
  "Melanocyte",
  top_n = 10,
  out_dir = output_dir
)

p_top_cd8 <- plot_top_gsea_for_celltype(
  gsea_hallmark_df,
  "CD8_T",
  top_n = 10,
  out_dir = output_dir
)

p_top_endo <- plot_top_gsea_for_celltype(
  gsea_hallmark_df,
  "Endothelial",
  top_n = 10,
  out_dir = output_dir
)

p_top_mac <- plot_top_gsea_for_celltype(
  gsea_hallmark_df,
  "Macrophage",
  top_n = 10,
  out_dir = output_dir
)
```

```{r}
top_gsea_directional <- gsea_hallmark_df %>%
  filter(padj < 0.10) %>%
  group_by(celltype, contrast) %>%
  arrange(desc(NES), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  bind_rows(
    gsea_hallmark_df %>%
      filter(padj < 0.10) %>%
      group_by(celltype, contrast) %>%
      arrange(NES, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      slice_head(n = 5)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct(celltype, contrast, pathway, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    pathway_clean = pathway %>%
      str_replace("^HALLMARK_", "") %>%
      str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
      str_to_title(),
    
    contrast_clean = case_when(
      contrast == "PRE_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PRE R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Responsive" ~ "PROG R vs PRE Resp",
      contrast == "PROG_Resistant_vs_PRE_Resistant" ~ "PROG R vs PRE R",
      TRUE ~ contrast
    ),
    
    neglog10_padj = -log10(padj)
  )
```

```{r}
plot_directional_gsea <- function(df, celltype_use) {
  
  df_use <- df %>%
    filter(celltype == celltype_use) %>%
    mutate(pathway_clean = reorder(pathway_clean, NES))
  
  p <- ggplot(
    df_use,
    aes(
      x = NES,
      y = pathway_clean,
      colour = NES,
      size = neglog10_padj
    )
  ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.9) +
    facet_wrap(~ contrast_clean, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_colour_gradient2(
      low = "#2C7BB6",
      mid = "grey90",
      high = "#D7191C",
      midpoint = 0,
      name = "NES"
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      range = c(1.5, 5),
      name = "-log10(FDR)"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.35)
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "NES",
      y = NULL,
      title = paste0("Directionally enriched Hallmark pathways: ", celltype_use)
    )
  
  return(p)
}

p_dir_melanocyte <- plot_directional_gsea(top_gsea_directional, "Melanocyte")
p_dir_cd8        <- plot_directional_gsea(top_gsea_directional, "CD8_T")
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_directional_top_Melanocyte.png"),
  plot = p_dir_melanocyte,
  width = 11,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_directional_top_CD8T.png"),
  plot = p_dir_cd8,
  width = 11,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
p_dir_endo <- plot_directional_gsea(
  top_gsea_directional,
  "Endothelial"
)

p_dir_mac <- plot_directional_gsea(
  top_gsea_directional,
  "Macrophage"
)
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_directional_top_Endothelial.png"),
  plot = p_dir_endo,
  width = 11,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "GSEA_directional_top_Macrophage.png"),
  plot = p_dir_mac,
  width = 11,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```
